zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Bowes於1443年出生在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，她的父親William Bowes28歲，母親Maud Fitzhugh15歲。她與William Hilton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1503年6月4日在英國達勒姆希爾頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆希爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Bowes于1443年出生在英国達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓时，她的父亲William Bowes28岁，母亲Maud Fitzhugh15岁。她与William Hilton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1503年6月4日在英国達勒姆希爾頓享年60岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆希爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Bowes was born in 1443, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, her father, William Bowes, was 28 and her mother, Maud Fitzhugh, was 15. She married William Hilton. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 4 June 1503, in Hilton, Durham, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Hilton, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Bowes est née en 1443, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Bowes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud Fitzhugh, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Hilton. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1503, à Hilton, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Hilton, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Bowes 1443 in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Bowes 28 und ihre Mutter Maud Fitzhugh 15. Sie hat William Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1503 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Hilton, Durham, England und wurde in Hilton, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bowes è nata il nel 1443 nel Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, sua padre, William Bowes, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Maud Fitzhugh, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Hilton. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 giugno 1503, nel Hilton, Durham, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Hilton, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Bowesが1443年にイギリスダルハムストレアトラム アンド スティイントンで生まれた時，父William Bowesは28歳，母Maud Fitzhughは15歳であった。William Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1503年6月4日にイギリスダルハムヒルトンで60歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムヒルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Bowes(이)가 1443년 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bowes(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Fitzhugh(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 William Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 6월 4일 영국 뒤람 힐턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 힐턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Bowes, Durham, England: Bowes, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bowes nasceu em 1443, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Bowes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maud Fitzhugh, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hilton. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1503, em Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Bowes родилась в 1443 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bowes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Fitzhugh, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hilton. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 4 июня 1503 г. в местности хилтон, дурам, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности хилтон, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Bowes nació en 1443, en Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Bowes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Maud Fitzhugh, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Hilton. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 4 de junio de 1503, en Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Hilton, Durham, Inglaterra.
